UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile with study statistics and streak tracking

userId.description: The unique Firebase Auth user ID

Deck.title: Deck
Deck.description: A study deck of flashcards generated from PDFs or input

deckId.description: Unique identifier of the study deck

userId.description: ID of the user who owns the deck

description.description: Detailed description of the deck content

cardCount.description: Total number of flashcards in this deck

sourceName.description: Name of the uploaded PDF or source document

Card.title: Card
Card.description: An individual flashcard within a deck, using spaced repetition indices

deckId.description: Identifier of the deck this card belongs to

userId.description: ID of the user who owns this card

updatedAt.description: When the card was last edited

repetition.description: Spaced repetition count for SM-2 Algorithm

interval.description: Interval in days before next review

efactor.description: Easiness factor used by the SM-2 algorithm

nextReviewDate.description: When the card should be reviewed next

StudySession.title: StudySession
StudySession.description: A record of a deck being studied by a user

sessionId.description: Unique identifier of the study session

startTime.description: Start timestamp of the study session

endTime.description: End timestamp of the study session

cardsReviewed.description: Number of cards reviewed in this session

/decks/{deckId}/cards/{cardId}.description: Cards stored within a specific deck
